song.title: O Jesus Jesus
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) O Jesus, Jesus, dearest Lord! Forgive me if I say, For very love, Thy sacred name A thousand times a day.
[C] Chorus O Jesus, Lord, with me abide; I rest in Thee, whate’er betide; Thy gracious smile is my reward; I love, I love Thee, Lord!
[V2] 2) I love Thee so I know not how My transports to control; Thy love is like a burning fire Within my very soul.
[V3] 3) For Thou to me art all in all; My honor and my wealth; My heart’s desire, my body’s strength, My soul’s eternal health.
[V4] 4) Burn, burn, O love, within my heart, Burn fiercely night and day, Till all the dross of earthly loves Is burned, and burned away.
[V5] 5) O light in darkness, joy in grief, O heaven’s life on earth; Jesus, my love, my treasure, who Can tell what Thou art worth?
[V6] 6) What limit is there to this love? Thy flight, where wilt Thou stay? On, on! our Lord is sweeter far Today than yesterday.
song.author: Frederick W. Faber
